name: PaymentSetUp
description: Customer wants to set up a new payment method on their account — such as a direct debit, autopay, or one-off card payments. They may also want to switch from one payment method to another (e.g., from direct debit to one-off payments). This is about creating a payment arrangement, not making an immediate payment, changing existing payment details, or arranging a hardship payment plan.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to set up a {paymentSetupType}
How do I set up {paymentSetupType} for my account?
Can I add {paymentSetupType} to my account?
I need to arrange {paymentSetupType} for my bills
How do I enable automatic payments?
I want to switch from {paymentSetupType} to paying by card each month
I'd like to stop my direct debit and pay by {paymentSetupType} instead
I cancelled my {paymentSetupType} and need to set it up again
Can I pay monthly without a direct debit?
How do I turn on autopay?
I don't have a direct debit set up — how do I add one?
I want my bills to come out automatically each month
Set up {paymentSetupType} on my account please
Is it possible to pay by card instead of direct debit?
I'd like to arrange {paymentSetupType} for my future bills
How do I get my payments taken automatically?
I want to switch to {paymentSetupType}
Can you set up a {paymentSetupType} using my bank details?
I've just changed bank and need to set up {paymentSetupType} on the new account
set up direct debit
